rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE SUHIEL GEORGE SALFITI AND VICTORIA SUHEIL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens For, Recovery Of Attorneys Fees And Costs, And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Petitioners failed to comply with Code of Civil Procedure Section 405.36 and request leave of court to re-record the lis pendens against two Trust properties. Respondents are awarded reasonable attorney's fees in the sum of $3,325 and $60 in filing costs. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party wishing to contest the Court's tentative ruling shall notify opposing counsel and the Court no later than 4/14, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE SUHIEL GEORGE SALFITI AND VICTORIA SUHEIL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Requiring Psychiatric Examination Of Victoria Suheil Salfiti
rulings.Rulings: Samer and Osama's Motion for Order Requiring Psychiatric Examination of Victoria Salfiti is DENIED. Samer and Osama failed to meet and confer with Victoria and Samia before bringing the motion. (C.C.P. Section 2032.310(b).) Samer and Osama's request for sanctions against Samia and Victoria is DENIED. Samia and Victoria's request for costs and expenses, including attorney's fees is GRANTED. The Court awards $950 in sanctions. If the previous January sanctions are not paid within 10 days of this order, additional sanctions will be imposed. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 4/14/2015.
